title: Deco Master - DIY Pen ASMR
summary: Make unique deco pens with cute beads and crafting ASMR!
description:
“Make a cute pink pen for my bestie!"
"Wow…! Your deco pens are so pretty! That’s skill!”

Deco Pen ASMR Live Start!
What kind of pen will we create today? Stack glossy pearls, soft ribbons, and a tiny kitty tucked in a heart frame… So dreamy!

From your cozy desk, filled with cute trinkets, go from 0 subscribers to 1 million views on your first livestream! Your deco creator journey begins here!

[ Pick Your Beads ]
Shimmering beads pour out like tiny jewels!
Tap and scoop your faves!

[ Decorate Your Pen ]
Mix and match to decorate your pen!
How about stars, ribbons, or even a dolphin dancing on the moon?
Your perfect deco pen is complete!

[ Go Live ]
Ta-da! Ready to show off your masterpiece?
“This ASMR is everything…!”
Watch as likes and comments pour in!
Grow your audience, unlock new beads, and become the top deco creator!
recentChanges:
Tap, scoop, sparkle! Make your own perfect deco pen!
- No need for a craft store! Unlimited deco fun, right at home!
- Start from your desk filled with trinkets, twinkling beads, and ASMR delights!
- What theme will you pick? Pink? Cute? Dreamy?
- Stack up heart beads, angel wings, and even kitty charms…!
- Ta-da! Your custom deco pen is complete!
- Click, snap! Show off your masterpiece as comments pour in!
- Oh? From shining dolphins to twinkling moons…! Unlock new beads and keep creating!!

This game is definitely a good one! Tanghulu Master and Fidget Town player here (sopcookielove) <3 It's very cute! And I made a special one when Bunderful requested for a Deco pen! It's very detailed and underrated! 💗🫐✨ Thank you Whoyaho corp for the hard work for these games.

THIS GAME IS SUPA KOOOLLLLL! I LOVE THE PENS THE KEYCHAINS ETC! I JUST LOVE EVERYTHING ABOUT IT!!! But when I was playing it it started glitching for example, their was no plate when I was choosing my pen same thing with choosing my keychains (it would take longer than usual) Plus when I was setting the timer in the thing it would still be there and I can't move the pen and it would also start when the timer is finish :( But thankfully it's rlly fun, and I have no regrets!
Adorable charms ,fun , a lot of fun ,cute and entertaining I'll call it a win😄
cool game it's similar too tanghulu master so cool update 😍🤩🤯

Lovely little game, downloaded because I play tanghulu master and really like this company's work. something I've noticed is that the money rewards are off; like when I spun the wheel for a money prize it landed on 1500 and I got 1000, and when I get a mission during a live maybe it says 300 at first and then I get 500? not a huge deal but something I noticed. can't wait to see more being added!
